name: insurance brokers processing 10–20 claims/month tool
description: For insurance brokers processing 10–20 claims/month, lack of real-time updates causes delayed client responses. We provide timely status updates instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets and emails.
problem_solved: Lack of real-time updates on claim statuses leads to delayed responses to clients.
